title: Include Items & Sub-Items in same workload widget view
excerpt:
Our management team utilizes the workload widget for scheduling purposes and although it is extremely helpful, the process would be much improved if we could see team’s assigned items & sub-items in the same view. 
As it…

posts.author: mboyle (Molly Boyle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our management team utilizes the workload widget for scheduling purposes and although it is extremely helpful, the process would be much improved if we could see team’s assigned items & sub-items in the same view.

As it stands right now, you must toggle from items to sub-items in the edit view.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 on this. we need the same

posts.author: cwood (Colin Wood)
posts.cookedHtml: Any news on when/if this might be included as an update? I too would find this extremely useful rather than having to cross reference two workload calendars… one for Items and one for Sub-items
